sample.text: Israeli cabinet members, led by Prime Minister Benjamin Netanyahu, defy Supreme Court ruling on media regulation.
sourced claim
Ukraine has begun construction of a memorial complex for the Heroes of the Heavenly Hundred.
Iran's military and intelligence officials vowed to avenge Khamenei's assassination, indicating a potential escalation in regional tensions.
Irina Rapoport, former Rosnano manager, sentenced to 15 years in absentia for embezzlement.
A total of 205 combat clashes occurred on June 21, with 49 aerial strikes and 2083 shellings reported.
US forces launched strikes on the Iranian coast following IRGC's missile attacks on commercial ships, indicating heightened conflict.
Alexander Neradko, former head of Rosaviation, arrested for fraud by Investigative Committee.
Increased Russian military activity has been observed in Lyman, indicating possible infiltration.
Iran's First Vice President praised Iraq for honoring Khamenei with a massive funeral turnout, reflecting deep ties between the nations.
FSB arrested women planning a terrorist attack in Pyatigorsk, allegedly on orders from Ukrainian intelligence.
Ukrainian military conducted training on chemical and biological defense on June 23, 2026.
Iran's armed forces launched attacks on U.S. military targets in Gulf states following the killing of Supreme Leader Ali Khamenei.
Vladislav Oleynik, a representative of the Karelia national movement, faces charges for not fulfilling 'foreign agent' duties.
Ukrainian forces hit the Orenburg gas processing plant and helium plant in Russia, causing fires.
Iran's Supreme Leader Ayatollah Ali Khamenei has been buried in Mashhad following his death, indicating a significant political transition.
The Russian Army has liberated Petro-Ivanovka in the Kharkov region, according to the Defense Ministry.
The European Commission has disbursed €3.2 billion to Ukraine as the first tranche of macro-financial assistance.
Ali Ansari is targeted by US sanctions for financially supporting Iran's Revolutionary Guards and enriching government elites.
Political analyst Tatiana Stanovaya is under investigation for ties to the Carnegie Center.
A cybersecurity tournament was held in Kyiv with over 50 participants from Ukrainian security forces.
U.S. Central Command hosted a regional security dialogue with leaders from 12 nations, including Bahrain and Saudi Arabia.
Italy expelled two Russian diplomats following the arrest of individuals accused of passing secret data to Russia.
International partners announced over €550 million for Ukraine's energy sector at URC2026.
Armed clashes erupted between IRGC forces and Kurdish opposition groups near Piranshahr and Sardasht.
